rules.message: Do not truncate output with {cmd}. Read the full output directly.
Do not pipe test output. Run the test command directly and read the full output.
Package runners ({cmd}) are banned. Do not run arbitrary packages.
Package runners ({cmd} {sub}) are banned. Do not run arbitrary packages.
Package runners ({cmd} {sub}) are banned. Do not run arbitrary packages.
Do not run binaries from node_modules/.bin/ directly. Use npm scripts from package.json instead.

rules.description: Run test/lint tools via package.json, not by path
rules.message: Do not run test/lint tools from node_modules/ by path. Use npm scripts from package.json instead.

rules.description: Don't suppress test/lint output with silent/quiet flags
rules.message: Do not suppress test/lint output with {cmd} --silent/--quiet. Read the full output.

rules.description: Don't use minimal reporters that hide test failures
rules.message: Do not use minimal test reporters with {cmd}. Use --reporter=verbose, dot, or default.

rules.description: Dot reporter must use --no-color to avoid ANSI bloat
rules.message: {cmd} with --reporter=dot must also use --no-color. ANSI codes bloat dot output.
Do not redirect output to /dev/null. Read the full output.

rules.description: Don't redirect test/lint output to files
rules.message: Do not redirect test output to a file ({target}). Read the full output directly.

rules.description: Don't suppress npm test output with --loglevel
rules.message: Do not suppress test output with {cmd} --loglevel. Read the full output.
